page_title: Diesel Locomotive DD51 (DMU Type) / Shiki 880 (B2 Beam Equipped) Schnabel Car
text:
is a locomotive that appears in Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone.

Features

First Powered locomotive: DD51
Second locomotive: DD51
Third locomotive: DD51
Fourth locomotive: Shiki 880 (B2 beam) Schnabel Car
Fifth locomotive: Shiki 880 (B2 beam) Schnabel Car

History

Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone

During Operation Yashima, which was carried out to defeat the Sixth Angel, it was tasked with transporting an outdoor 275Kv ultra-high voltage standard transformer, required for using the 2nd Experimental High Power Self-Propelled 460mm Positron Cannon, to Futagoyama, near the sniping point.

Development

It was designed by Takeshi Takakura for the Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone film. Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone - Complete Records Visual Story Edition - Setting Material Edition p.278
